title: 4-to-2 Line Priority Encoder Function
description: A block diagram illustrating the inputs, logic, and outputs of a 4-to-2 priority encoder, showing how multiple active inputs are resolved to a binary code.
relationships: Input lines feed into the encoder logic
Encoder logic processes inputs based on priority (I3 highest)
Output lines (Y1,Y0) display the binary code of the highest priority active input
Valid output (V) is high when any input is active
